subject: [PATCH v3 05/10] fuse: refactor setting up copy state for payload copying

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch refactors the code for setting up copy state in the FUSE implementation of dev_uring by introducing a new helper function `setup_fuse_copy_state`. This function encapsulates the logic for importing user buffers and initializing the copy state. The existing code is simplified and made more modular, reducing duplication and improving maintainability.
